projects.name: codex-pet-live
projects.zh_notes: 面向 Windows 桌面的 Codex 宠物运行时，用于承载、展示和驱动交互式桌面宠物。
projects.en_notes: A Windows desktop Codex pet runtime for hosting, displaying, and driving interactive desktop companions.
projects.notes: A Windows desktop Codex pet runtime for hosting, displaying, and driving interactive desktop companions.

projects.name: fill-contributions-graph
projects.zh_notes: GitHub Contribution Graph 荒漠绿化治理工程。
projects.en_notes: A utility for backfilling and maintaining GitHub contribution graph activity.
projects.notes: A utility for backfilling and maintaining GitHub contribution graph activity.

projects.name: vectorpeak-blogs
projects.zh_notes: 个人博客与知识站点，用于记录技术学习、深度学习实践、算法题解与阶段性思考。
projects.en_notes: Personal blog and knowledge site for technical learning, deep learning practice, algorithm notes, and staged reflections.
projects.notes: Personal blog and knowledge site for technical learning, deep learning practice, algorithm notes, and staged reflections.

projects.name: lingban-ai-chat
projects.zh_notes: 灵伴 AI 聊天 Android 客户端与后端 API 仓库。
projects.en_notes: Lingban AI chat Android client and backend API repository.
projects.notes: Lingban AI chat Android client and backend API repository.

projects.name: KnowFoundry-RAG-Console
projects.zh_notes: 面向知识库和 RAG 工作流的控制台项目，用于沉淀检索增强生成应用的工程实践。
projects.en_notes: A console project for knowledge-base and RAG workflows, used to capture engineering practice for retrieval-augmented generation apps.
projects.notes: A console project for knowledge-base and RAG workflows, used to capture engineering practice for retrieval-augmented generation apps.

projects.name: vectorpeak-agent-skills
projects.zh_notes: 可复用的 Agent / Codex 技能库，覆盖软件工程、知识工作和职业工作流自动化。
projects.en_notes: A reusable Agent and Codex skill library for software engineering, knowledge work, and professional workflow automation.
projects.notes: A reusable Agent and Codex skill library for software engineering, knowledge work, and professional workflow automation.

projects.name: OpenSense
projects.zh_notes: 面向已知开源项目的每日 PR 机会发现工具。
projects.en_notes: Daily PR opportunity finder for known open-source repositories.
projects.notes: Daily PR opportunity finder for known open-source repositories.

projects.name: LLM-Wiki
projects.zh_notes: 大语言模型知识库，覆盖 LLM、Agent、RAG、训练、评测方法和 AI 工程实践。
projects.en_notes: A structured knowledge base for large language model technologies, covering LLMs, Agents, RAG, model training, evaluation methods, and AI engineering practices.
projects.notes: A structured knowledge base for large language model technologies, covering LLMs, Agents, RAG, model training, evaluation methods, and AI engineering practices.

projects.name: carbon-tower-predictor
projects.zh_notes: 工业碳化塔取出液温度预测项目，用历史 DCS 传感器数据进行趋势预测、异常预警与预测性维护。
projects.en_notes: An industrial carbonization tower outlet temperature prediction project using historical DCS sensor data for trend forecasting, anomaly warning, and predictive maintenance.
projects.notes: An industrial carbonization tower outlet temperature prediction project using historical DCS sensor data for trend forecasting, anomaly warning, and predictive maintenance.

projects.name: kaggle-tabular-forge
projects.zh_notes: 面向 Kaggle 表格竞赛的实验工厂，覆盖特征挖掘、OOF 纪律、深度 stacking 和 AI 评审工作流。
projects.en_notes: A goal-driven Kaggle tabular experiment factory covering feature mining, OOF discipline, deep stacking, and AI review workflows.
projects.notes: A goal-driven Kaggle tabular experiment factory covering feature mining, OOF discipline, deep stacking, and AI review workflows.

projects.name: industrial-fault-text-classifier
projects.zh_notes: 基于 BERT 的化工设备故障文本分类方案，用于报修工单分析、故障类别识别和风险预警。
projects.en_notes: BERT-based industrial equipment fault text classification for repair-ticket analysis, fault recognition, and risk warning.
projects.notes: BERT-based industrial equipment fault text classification for repair-ticket analysis, fault recognition, and risk warning.
